productDisplayName: Fastrack Men Non Leather Black Silver Color Brass Belt
description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure a bottom, or act as a styling detail to tops and trousers. This synthetic leather belt from fastrack is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire.Length: Freesize Made of synthetic leather for durability and style Tang clasp to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Broad base to sit snug on the waist One fixed loop, and one movable loop to hold the tongue in place Brand name embossed on the loop CareUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
